title: Kippistia serrata
taxonomy: Kippistia serrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in Cameroon. The plant is classified within the genus Kippistia, which is a small group of plants. The Sapindaceae family is a large group of plants that includes other species such as soapberries and lychees. The classification of Kippistia serrata highlights its unique characteristics within the plant kingdom.
